visualCharacteristics.structure: 3-column grid of article cards with image + category tag + title

contentPattern.structure: filter checkboxes + article count + card grid (image + tag + title) + pagination

suitableFor: article listing pages with filterable card grids
category landing pages showing article collections
body-part article index pages (knee, hip, shoulder, etc.)
content feeds with image thumbnails and category tags
notSuitableFor: CTA promotional cards with action buttons
simple card grids without filtering or pagination
